cafe.header.title: Aiko Cafe
cafe.header.subtitle: A cozy top-down space with Aiko and friends
cafe.sidebar.title: Cafe Lobby
cafe.sidebar.subtitle: Guest-friendly social co-op
cafe.sidebar.guestNote: Sign in to save Cafe Stars and continue on other devices.
cafe.cosmetics.title: Cafe wardrobe
cafe.cosmetics.description: Cafe Stars are lifetime progress. Reach each goal to unlock a look; stars are never spent.
cafe.cosmetics.empty: The wardrobe is unavailable right now. Refresh the cafe to try again.
cafe.cosmetics.equipError: That look could not be equipped. Your previous look is still active.
cafe.cosmetics.sakura_pin.name: Sakura pin
cafe.cosmetics.sakura_pin.description: A small welcome gift from Aiko for every cafe visitor.
cafe.cosmetics.mint_scarf.name: Mint scarf
cafe.cosmetics.mint_scarf.description: A fresh green scarf unlocked after earning 3 Cafe Stars.
cafe.cosmetics.tea_hat.name: Tea hat
cafe.cosmetics.tea_hat.description: A playful tea-colored hat unlocked after earning 5 Cafe Stars.
cafe.lobby.heroTitle: The kettle is warm. Come on in.
cafe.lobby.heroDescription: Help Aiko prepare tea and play with up to 8 players.
cafe.lobby.aikoAlt: Aiko welcoming visitors to the cafe
cafe.lobby.publicRoomsDescription: Quick Join prefers the busiest available cafe.
cafe.lobby.loadError: The cafe lobby could not be loaded. Please try again.
cafe.lobby.actionError: That cafe is unavailable or full. Please try another room.
cafe.lobby.roomNotFound: No room matches that invite code. It may have closed.
cafe.lobby.roomFull: That room is full. Please try another cafe.
cafe.activity.title: Tea for everyone
cafe.activity.description: Find three tea leaves around the cafe and bring them back to Aiko.
cafe.activity.findHintDesktop: Move near a tea leaf, then press E to collect it.
cafe.activity.findHintMobile: Move near a tea leaf, then tap Collect.
cafe.activity.returnHintDesktop: Go to the counter, then press E to deliver the tea leaves.
cafe.activity.returnHintMobile: Go to the counter, then tap Deliver.
cafe.activity.completeHint: Everyone in the cafe earned a Cafe Star.
cafe.room.title: Cafe Room
cafe.room.offlineMessage: You are offline. Movement and actions will resume after the cafe reconnects.
cafe.room.errorNotFound: This room has closed or no longer exists.
cafe.room.errorFull: This room already has eight visitors.
cafe.room.errorRateLimited: Cafe actions were sent too quickly. Wait a moment and try again.
cafe.room.errorUnreadable: The cafe sent an unreadable update. Try connecting again.
cafe.room.errorInterrupted: The connection was interrupted. The cafe is reconnecting now.
cafe.room.errorUnavailable: The cafe could not be reached. Check your connection and try again.
cafe.room.controls: Move with WASD or arrow keys. Press E near Aiko or a tea leaf. Mobile controls appear on touch-sized screens.
cafe.guide.title: Help Aiko make tea
cafe.guide.description: Collect three glowing tea leaves around the cafe, then bring them to Aiko at the counter.
cafe.guide.desktopControls: Move with WASD or the arrow keys · Press E when an action appears
cafe.guide.mobileControls: Use the arrow pad to move · Tap the action button when it lights up

chat.sidebar.title: WFChat
chat.sidebar.subtitle: Waifu companion UI
chat.details.aboutText: {name} is calm, warm, and quietly affectionate. She keeps the conversation gentle, grounded, and lightly playful.
chat.details.gentleModeDesc: Soft humor, calm replies, and clear boundaries.
chat.messageList.banner: {name} is tuned for warm roleplay, soft coaching, and concise creative rewrites.
chat.messageList.emptyDesc: Your chat is empty. Send the first message when you are ready.
chat.messageList.hideConfirmDesc: This hides it from your view only. It will not be deleted from server history.
chat.composer.voiceMessageUnsupported: This browser cannot record microphone audio here.
chat.composer.voiceMessagePermissionFail: Microphone permission was denied or is unavailable.
chat.composer.voiceMessageEmpty: No audio was captured. Try recording again.
chat.composer.imageUnsupported: Only PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF images are supported.
chat.composer.imageLimit: You can attach up to {count} images.
chat.composer.waitBeforeSending: Wait for {name} to reply before sending again
chat.session.connectError: Could not connect to the chat API.
chat.session.notFound: This chat is no longer available for the current session.
chat.session.cachedReadOnly: This chat is only available from cache. You can read it, but cannot send new messages here.
chat.session.aiNoResponse: The AI service did not respond. Check the backend console and API key.
chat.session.attachmentUploadError: Could not upload the image. Check the file type and size, then try again.
chat.session.attachmentTooLarge: The image is too large for the server upload limit. Use a smaller image and try again.
chat.session.attachmentUnsupported: This image type is not supported. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF.
chat.session.attachmentInvalid: This image could not be read as a valid image. Try another file.
chat.session.clearConfirmDesc: This removes all messages from this chat.
chat.session.clearError: Could not clear this chat. Try again.
chat.session.deleteConfirmDesc: This permanently deletes this chat and all its messages.
chat.session.deleteError: Could not delete this chat. Try again.
auth.profile.guestDescription: You are not signed in yet.
auth.profile.syncCompleteDescription: Your latest chats and settings are ready on this device.
auth.profile.syncError: Could not update your data. Please try again.
auth.profile.beforeLoginItemSync: Sync your latest data to the cloud
auth.profile.beforeLoginItemBackup: Lower risk of data loss when switching devices
auth.profile.profileSaveError: Could not save profile. Please try again.
auth.profile.syncReady: Chats and settings stay updated with this account.
